8910.issue: [S8910] File "/.github/workflows/dependabot-auto-merge.yml.OLD" was found. If it is no longer needed, consider deleting it.

0028.issue: [W0028] Minimum node.js version 22 recommended. Please adapt "{'engines' : { 'node' >= '20' } }" to "{'engines' : { 'node' >= '22' } }" at [package.json](https://github.com/ticaki/ioBroker.brightsky/blob/master/package.json).

0066.issue: [W0066] "@types/node":"^25.6.0" at [package.json](https://github.com/ticaki/ioBroker.brightsky/blob/master/package.json) allows major version greater than 20. Downgrade to node.js 20.x.x to avoid wrong typing is recommended.
